General.Name: Maike Tube Industry Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Maike Tube Industry Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells steel pipe products and prefabricated pipe nipple products in the People's Republic of China, the United States, rest of the Americas, rest of Asia, Europe, and internationally. The company's products include ERW and spiral steel pipes, and electrical products; standard prefabricated steel, stainless, and brass pipe nipples, as well as couplings/sockets, welded outlets, and others; refrigerating station, intelligent irrigation, fire pump room, and commercial fire piping prefabrication services; seamless pipe; spiral submerged arc welded steel pipes; and customized steel pipes. It also engages in the design and supply of assembled piping systems, as well as trades in steel coils. The company serves gas, as well as heating, ventilation, and air conditioning companies; and water supply companies, infrastructure and construction companies, wholesalers, and distributors. Maike Tube Industry Holdings Limited was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Jinan, the People's Republic of China.

4.Name: Mr. Mingze  Tian
4.Title: Chief of SSAW Steel Pipe Production & GM of Vietnam Piping
